description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling, single-story layout with multiple rectangular wings extending from a central core, creating a cross-shaped footprint. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections possibly featuring slight elevation changes or parapets. The exterior includes several small trees, shrubs, and outdoor furnishings, suggesting landscaped surroundings and a focus on outdoor living. Large window openings and multiple doorways are visible, providing ample natural light and access to the exterior. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with some metallic or glass elements for windows and doors. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a cross-shaped layout, flat roof, and landscaped surroundings, featuring large windows and multiple outdoor access points.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main entrance, central core, and several wings extending outward, with visible landscaping elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated wing, flat roof, and a row of small trees or shrubs along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying additional outdoor spaces, secondary entrances, and more landscaping details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the extended wing, flat roof, and a clear view of the building's overall footprint.
